bleepingcomputer.title: Termite ransomware breaches linked to ClickFix CastleRAT attacks
bleepingcomputer.description: Ransomware threat actors tracked as Velvet Tempest are using the ClickFix technique and legitimate Windows utilities to deploy the DonutLoader malware and the CastleRAT backdoor. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Bill Toulas
bleepingcomputer.intro: 被追踪为 Velvet Tempest 的勒索软件威胁行为者利用 ClickFix 技术和合法 Windows 工具，投递 DonutLoader 恶意软件与 CastleRAT 后门。

bleepingcomputer.title: Microsoft: Hackers abusing AI at every stage of cyberattacks
bleepingcomputer.description: Microsoft says threat actors are increasingly using artificial intelligence in their operations to accelerate attacks, scale malicious activity, and lower technical barriers across all aspects of a cyberattack. [...]
bleepingcomputer.author: Lawrence Abrams
bleepingcomputer.intro: 微软表示，威胁行为者日益频繁地在攻击活动中利用人工智能，以此加速攻击进程、扩大恶意活动规模，并降低网络攻击全流程的技术门槛。
